message.en:
"--- v0.9.2 ---e7bdce5 fix(ui): update default settings and correct storage key\n08207f7 ci: add click_action to release notification payload\n433e677 chore: update versionarte.json to v0.9.1\n"

"--- v0.9.1 ---52d0aa8 refactor: extract bloc listeners and ui builder into separate methods\n3ce7137 refactor(notifications): extract firebase messaging logic into NotificationService\n8db3707 Merge remote-tracking branch origin/main\n276f782 feat(notifications): add flutter notification click action support\ncad8d12 chore: update versionarte.json to v0.9.0\n"

"--- v0.9.0 ---12c6271 feat(notifications): handle update_available message type\n2f4cf33 ci: add fcm notification job for new version releases\nd6501c6 feat(messaging): subscribe users to all_users topic\nd33a37a fix: correct kDebugMode logic for scanner and debugger listeners\na7c07c6 chore: update versionarte.json to v0.8.1\n"

"--- v0.8.1 ---9d76989 chore(scanner): wrap scanner bloc listener with debug mode check\nc6676d7 feat(ui): update popup styling and add localized error strings\n00169d8 refactor: centralize shake detector and add debug route\nc37a9d8 refactor(ui): replace SmartDialog with fluttertoast for app notifications\nd136193 refactor(sensor): remove nfc_helper utility\n008677d chore: update versionarte.json to v0.8.0\n"

"--- v0.8.0 ---538dc9f Merge remote-tracking branch origin/main\nfffe6d6 feat(fcm): implement push notification navigation and background handling\n568cea0 feat(notifications): add notification permissions and foreground message handling\nfb77be7 feat(fcm): implement token initialization and refresh logic\ncd41556 feat(firebase): initialize firebase and add messaging support\ne72a1aa chore: update versionarte.json to v0.7.7\n"

"--- v0.7.7 ---395476c feat(revenue): implement reactive filtering for revenue list\n68f5119 chore: fix status message formatting in versionarte.json\n"

--- v0.7.5 ---\nf45f892 feat(changelog): rewrite display logic to group entries by type and scope\n1502f60 Revert \"Update versionarte.json\"\n5efaea9 feat(settings): enable child scrollability in changelog screen\n4d949b5 Update versionarte.json\n9c81dea chore: update versionarte.json and changelog to v0.7.4\n"

"--- v0.7.4 ---\\n25e4e3a feat(changelog): filter merge commits and improve entry parsing\n04b0c52 feat(ui): support multi-version history in changelog screen\naced827 Merge remote-tracking branch origin/main\nfb8e63d ci(workflow): prepend versioned changelog to versionarte.json\n4a058a4 chore: update versionarte.json and changelog for v0.7.3\n50e7bf8 chore: update versionarte.json and changelog to v0.7.3\n"
